title: Marketplace Offer Wizard import
description: Schema for an offering payload that can be passed to the Marketplace Offer Wizard via the ?offer= deep-link parameter (raw URL-encoded JSON or base64url-encoded JSON). The wizard validates the payload against the offer-type catalog, pre-fills its state and jumps to the first step that still needs input. All values are identifiers from the wizard catalog, not display labels.

offerTypeId.description: The marketplace offer type. Anchors the whole payload; an unknown value causes the import to be ignored.

categoryId.description: Optional decision-tree category. Derived from offerTypeId when omitted.

answers.description: Optional decision-tree answers (questionId -> optionId). Derived from offerTypeId when omitted.

listingOptionId.description: How customers acquire the offer. Must be valid for the chosen offer type; falls back to the sole option when only one is available.

billingLanguage.description: Preferred language for the generated billing/webhook starter template.

billingModelIds.description: Billing models to pre-select. Filtered to the models supported by the chosen offer type.

listing.description: Listing copy keyed by field id. Only fields valid for the offer type are kept; unknown keys are dropped.

description.description: Full listing description (supports basic HTML, <= 3000 chars).

plans.description: Pricing plans. Each plan's billingModelId is validated against the offer type; referenced models are auto-selected. Plan ids are generated by the wizard.

assets.description: Optional listing assets keyed by asset id. Values must be data: URLs. Generated share links omit assets to stay short; callers may include them but URLs can grow large.
